creator: antoine@FreeBSD.org
text:
I reverted this upgrade as it breaks packaging of most ports depending on it,  it's not good 2 days before 2017Q1 is branched.

Please request an exp-run if you can't test all ports depending on it yourself.

A few failures (not exhaustive):

http://package20.nyi.freebsd.org/data/93amd64-default-baseline/429953/logs/errors/py27-cssselect-0.9.1_1.log
http://package20.nyi.freebsd.org/data/93amd64-default-baseline/429953/logs/errors/shiboken-1.2.2_2.log
http://package20.nyi.freebsd.org/data/93amd64-default-baseline/429953/logs/errors/py27-pathtools-0.1.2_3.log
http://package20.nyi.freebsd.org/data/93amd64-default-baseline/429953/logs/errors/llvm34-3.4.2_4.log
http://package20.nyi.freebsd.org/data/93amd64-default-baseline/429953/logs/errors/llvm33-3.3_11.log
http://package20.nyi.freebsd.org/data/93amd64-default-baseline/429953/logs/errors/llvm35-3.5.2_2.log
